main_title: 3 Horrifying Stories of Women Who Were Stalked by Men They Met at Bars

stories.seed: I started noticing that the bartender at my favorite pub would always seem to be working on the nights I went in, and at first, I thought it was just a coincidence, but then I saw him outside my apartment building, lingering by the entrance. I tried to brush it off as mere curiosity, but the way he'd smile at me from across the bar, his eyes locked on mine, made my skin crawl.
stories.summary: A woman is stalked by a bartender who becomes increasingly unhinged after she rejects his advances.

stories.seed: I thought I'd met a charming and harmless guy at a bar, and we exchanged numbers, but after a few casual meetups, he started showing up at my workplace, claiming he was in the area and wanted to "surprise" me, and I realized he'd been tracking my daily commute using the ride-sharing app we'd used on our first date. I tried to distance myself, but he'd send me messages, saying he knew exactly where I was, and would often "coincidentally" be in the same carpool as me, sitting silently in the backseat, staring at me.
stories.summary: A woman is stalked by a man she met through a ride-sharing service, who uses the app to track her movements and confront her in terrifying ways.

stories.seed: I met a guy at an outdoor music festival, and we had a wild night, but when I woke up the next morning, he was gone, and I thought that was the end of it, until I started receiving packages at my home, each containing a small memento from that night, like a guitar pick or a festival map, with no note, just his initials. I was horrified when I realized that he'd not only found out where I lived, but had also been following me to my favorite hiking trails, leaving these "gifts" for me to find, each one a reminder that he was always watching.
stories.summary: A woman is stalked by a man she met at a music festival, who uses gifts and surveillance to manipulate and control her, making her feel trapped and vulnerable in her own home and outdoor spaces.
